'''鈭歵-ch-ng-zh''' ('''katachngezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hocus|hocus]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ch-ng-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hocus|hocus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-ch-ng-zh
|-
! Lemma
| katachngezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitachngezhoko|thitachngezhoko]] || [[word:jitachngezhoko|jitachngezhoko]] || [[word:shitachngezhoko|shitachngezhoko]] || [[word:kitachngezhoko|kitachngezhoko]]
